Sve ńáe ovo prońái 
Samo ti mi dońĎi

Samo samo samo

Daj dodaj mi tog vina vina 
Nek vozi nas i ritam 
Ti zavodi me 
Ma samo nek te ima ima
JoŇ° dolivam benzina
Nek izgori sve

Samo samo dah po dahh
U samońái 
Samo samo dan po dan 
Sve ńáe dońái 
Ne traju ni zauvek 
Ove nońái 
Sve ńáe ovo prońái 
Samo mi ti dońĎi

snippet.title: Obrańáanje predsednika Srbije Aleksandra Vuńćińáa posle sednice Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost (18+)
snippet.description:
NajbrŇĺe rastuńái portal u Srbiji https://www.alo.rs/‚Äč 

Sednica Saveta za nacionalnu bezbednost na kojoj ńáe se raspravljati o detaljima u vezi sa akcijom borbe protiv organizovanog kriminala u Srbiji odrŇĺala se u 18 ńćasova u Palati Srbija.

Kako je Vuńćińá najavio ranije danas, na sednici se razmatraju veoma ozbiljna pitanja, situacija oko korona virusa, nove prilike na Kosovu i Metohiji, u regionu, u svetu i Evropi, novoj administraciji u SAD, a pre svega o borbi protiv organizovanog kriminala.

Umjesto ńćarapa ŇĹarko noge oblaŇĺe prvo papirom od vreńáa za braŇ°no a zatim sve to obloŇĺi najlonom. Nakon toga obuva obuńáa na noge. Bez obzira na vanjsku temperaturu ŇĹare ne nosi ńćarape. snippet.title: Starship | SN10 | High-Altitude Flight Test
snippet.description:
As early as Wednesday, March 3, the SpaceX team will attempt a high-altitude flight test of Starship serial number 10 (SN10) ‚Äď our third high-altitude suborbital flight test of a Starship prototype from SpaceX‚Äôs site in Cameron County, Texas. Similar to the high-altitude flight tests of Starship SN8 and SN9, SN10 will be powered through ascent by three Raptor engines, each shutting down in sequence prior to the vehicle reaching apogee ‚Äď approximately 10 km in altitude. SN10 will perform a propellant transition to the internal header tanks, which hold landing propellant, before reorienting itself for reentry and a controlled aerodynamic descent.
  
The Starship prototype will descend under active aerodynamic control, accomplished by independent movement of two forward and two aft flaps on the vehicle. All four flaps are actuated by an onboard flight computer to control Starship‚Äôs attitude during flight and enable precise landing at the intended location. SN10‚Äôs Raptor engines will then reignite as the vehicle attempts a landing flip maneuver immediately before touching down on the landing pad adjacent to the launch mount. 

A controlled aerodynamic descent with body flaps and vertical landing capability, combined with in-space refilling, are critical to landing Starship at destinations across the solar system where prepared surfaces or runways do not exist, and returning to Earth. This capability will enable a fully reusable transportation system designed to carry both crew and cargo on long-duration, interplanetary flights and help humanity return to the Moon, and travel to Mars and beyond.  

Given the dynamic schedule of development testing, stay tuned to our social media channels for updates as we move toward SpaceX‚Äôs third high-altitude flight test of Starship!

snippet.title: Emanet 130. B√∂l√ľm FragmanńĪ | Legacy Episode 130 Promo (English & Spanish subs)
snippet.description:
Abone Ol / Subscribe: https://bit.ly/2TLyNnG
Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts. 

#Legacy
#Emanet
#SehYam
#Shorts

snippet.title: INTERVJU: Zoran Brankovińá - Velja Nevolja je dokaz da je viteŇ°tvo nestalo sa asfalta! (26.2.2021)
snippet.description:
Gost emisije "Intervju" bio je Zoran Lepi Brankovińá, momak sa voŇĺdovańćkog asfalta i legenda devedesetih. VidevŇ°i svoj uzor u starijima poput ńźorńĎa BoŇĺovińáa GiŇ°ke, uz svoju brańáu Rukija i SaŇ°u, prijatelje Aleksandra KneŇĺevińáa Kneleta, Kristijana Golubovińáa, Bojana Banovińáa i ostale odrastao je u vremenima vrelog beogradskog asfalta. Poznavao je ŇĹeljka RaŇĺnatovińáa Arkana, Sredoja Ň†ljukińáa Ň†ljuku, Zorana Uskokovińáa Skoleta, Radeta ńÜaldovińáa ńÜentu i mnoge druge koji su otiŇ°li u legendu. Godine provedene u zatvorima i meci koji su ga pogańĎali nisu uspeli da ga pokolebaju. Samo je postao jańći i odluńćniji da zauvek sańćuva status ńćoveka koji se nińćega ne plaŇ°i. Upravo zbog svoje odluńćnosti nije sańćekao da mu istekne zatvorska kazna koju sluŇĺi, veńá je reŇ°io da s "nanogicom" objasni zbog ńćega su devedesete bile opasno vreme i zaŇ°to njihov duh i daje provejava beogradskim ulicama. Preporuńćujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 19.02.2021. godine u naŇ°im prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavkovińá.

*************************************************************

Svi koji verno prate emisije i Ňĺele da pomognu rad naŇ°e produkcije to mogu uńćiniti iz Srbije i iz inostranstva. Trudińáemo se da ostanemo dosledni naŇ°oj ideji o slobodnom novinarstvu i Ň°irenju istine bez cenzure.

Godine provedene u zatvorima i meci koji su ga pogańĎali nisu uspeli da ga pokolebaju. Samo je postao jańći i odluńćniji da zauvek sańćuva status ńćoveka koji se nińćega ne plaŇ°i. Upravo zbog svoje odluńćnosti nije sańćekao da mu istekne zatvorska kazna koju sluŇĺi, veńá je reŇ°io da s "nanogicom" objasni zbog ńćega su devedesete bile opasno vreme i zaŇ°to njihov duh i daje provejava beogradskim ulicama. Preporuńćujemo Vam da pogledate ceo intervju i saznate viŇ°e o brojnim zanimljivim temama.

Intervju je snimljen 19.02.2021. godine u naŇ°im prostorijama, u Beogradu. Emisiju je vodio novinar Aleksandar Pavkovińá.

*************************************************************

snippet.title: Watch NASA‚Äôs Perseverance Rover Land on Mars!
snippet.description:
Watch an epic journey unfold on Thursday, Feb. 18 as our Perseverance rover lands on Mars. To reach the surface of the Red Planet, the rover has to survive the harrowing final phase known as Entry, Descent, and Landing.
 
Only then can the rover ‚Äď the biggest, heaviest, cleanest, and most sophisticated six-wheeled robot ever launched into space ‚Äď search Jezero Crater for signs of ancient life and collect samples that will eventually be returned to Earth.
 
Tune in to a live video feed of key landing activities and commentary from Mission Control at NASA‚Äôs Jet Propulsion Laboratory.

But how do they compare? First up, Mat‚Äôs GT-R NISMO is powered by a 3.8-litre twin-turbo V6 which can produce 600hp & 650Nm. The R8 alongside him has a 5.2-litre V10 with 625hp & 590Nm of torque. And then finally we have the Porsche, which has a 3.8-litre flat-six turbo to produce 650hp & 800Nm. 

So, there's one thing they have in common - they‚Äôre all absolutely awesome machines! But of course, there can only be one winner - so who‚Äôs your money on? We know how quick the 911 Turbo is, so it may be a foregone conclusion when it comes to who snatches the win... But could Mat snatch second place from Yianni in the Audi R8?

There‚Äôs only one way to find out‚Ä¶ LET‚ÄôS RACE!

snippet.title: Game Recap: Nuggets 128, Bucks 97
snippet.description: Nikola Jokic recorded the 50th triple-double of his career as he tallied 37 points, 10 rebounds and 11 assists for the Nuggets as they defeated the Bucks, 128-97. Giannis Antetokounmpo recorded 27 points, eight rebounds and three assists for the Bucks in the losing effort. The Nuggets improve to 20-15 on the season, while the Bucks fall to 21-14.

Yaman KńĪrńĪmlńĪ is a successful and young businessman who had a rough childhood but never gave up, on the contrary he even became stronger with every obstacle. He started his life from the bottom and became very wealthy. All he has in his world, is a family that he has to take care of after his father‚Äôs death. He closed his heart to all romantic feelings a long time ago and his only weakness is his 5-year old nephew‚Ä¶ Little Yusuf is very well protected under his uncle‚Äôs arms, but he craves loves and sympathy. The only happy image in his mind is his aunt Seher. 
 
Seher is a beautiful and humble girl living with her grandfather. Her life is shaken by the death of her sister who was the bride of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ family. From now on, she has a legacy she has to take care at all costs: Her little nephew Yusuf. This adventure will arise the long hidden secrets of the KńĪrńĪmlńĪ mansion; while a whole another legacy will start to grow in Seher and Yaman's hearts.

snippet.title: Plazma torta sa milka ńćokoladom, pojela se odmah pa sam ponovo pravila da bih vam uslikala presek.
snippet.description:
Nisam se nadala da ńáe u roku od pola sata ,,nestati"ove torte i da ńáu ostati bez preseka i slike (a bez toga vam ne mogu pustiti recept)..tako da sam je opet pravila, Ň°to je mojima savrŇ°eno odgovaralo :)
Torta sa plazma keksom, milka ńćokoladom i leŇ°nicima. Odmah se pojela bez obzira Ň°to spada u one torte kojih je dovoljno jedno parńće. Korice su lagane od belanaca (nisu suŇ°ene) i plazma keksa.
#milkatorta #plazmatorta #rońĎendansketorte
sveńćane torte
torte sa korama
Recepte moŇĺete ńćitati na blogu: http://www.serpica.net/2021/02/plazma-torta-sa-milka-cokoladom.html


Sastojci i priprema:
Kora:

- 5 belanaca
- 5 kaŇ°ika Ň°eńáera
- 1,5 kaŇ°ika braŇ°na
- 5 kaŇ°ika mlevene plazme

3 - 4 kaŇ°ike vode ili mleka za prelivanje peńćenih kora

Prave se ovakve 3 kore.

Umutiti belanca i Ň°eńáer u ńćvrst sneg. UmeŇ°ati braŇ°no i plazmu. Peńái u zagrejanoj rerni na 180 stepeni do 20 minuta. Peńćene kore premazati vodom ili mlekom, 3-4 kaŇ°ike je dovoljno.

Fil:

- 15 Ňĺumanaca
- 150 gr. Ň°eńáera
- 200 gr. maslaca ili margarina
- 100 gr. crne milka ńćokolade
- 100 gr. bele milka ńćokolade
- 200 gr. mlevene plazme
- 100 gr. mlevenih leŇ°nika (lepŇ°e ako su predhodno peńćeni)
- 300 ml. slatke pavlake

Umutiti Ňĺumanca sa Ň°eńáerom i kuvati na pari uz neprestano meŇ°anje, oko 10 minuta.
Ostaviti da se ohladi. Za to vreme rastopiti ńćokolade, umutiti maslac i slatku pavlaku.
U fil mikserom umeŇ°ati maslac i ńćetiri pune kaŇ°ike slatke pavlake.
UmeŇ°ati leŇ°nike i plazma keks. Podeliti fil na dva dela, u jedna deo staviti rastopljenu tamnu ńćokoladu u drugi deo rastopljenu belu ńćokoladu.

Na tacnu staviti kalup i u njemu filovati tortu.
Kora, tamniji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora, svetliji fil, slatka pavlaka, kora. Odozgo izmeŇ°ati ostatake filova, uvek ostavim kaŇ°iku-dve fila i malo slatke pavlake. To mi bude fil s kojim premaŇĺem treńáu koru. 
MoŇĺete ukrasiti Ň°lagom ili rastopljenom ńćokoladom.
Torta mora da odstoji jedna dan u friŇĺideru pa tek onda seńái i posluŇĺiti.
Prijatno!

RAZNI RECEPTI - BIRAJTE

en.title: Cake with milk chocolate and ground biscuits, the best cake ever!
en.description:
#cake #chocolate #recipes
Ingredients and preparation:

Biscuit:
- 5 egg whites
- 5 tablespoons of sugar
- 1.5 tablespoons of flour
- 5 tablespoons ground biscuits

3-4 tablespoons of water or milk for topping baked biscuits

Prepare three biscuits.

Whisk egg whites and sugar. Stir in flour and ground biscuits. Bake in a preheated oven at 180 degrees for up to 20 minutes. Coat the baked biscuits with water or milk, 3-4 tablespoons is enough.

Cream:

- 15 egg yolks
- 150 gr. sugar
- 200 gr. butter or margarine
- 100 gr. dark milka chocolate
- 100 gr. white milk chocolate
- 200 gr. ground biscuits
- 100 gr. hazelnuts (better if pre-baked)
- 300 ml. whipped cream

Whisk the egg yolks with the sugar and cook on a steamer with a constant question, about 10 minutes.
Allow to cool. Meanwhile, melt the chocolate, whisk the butter. Whip the whipped cream.
Add 4 tablespoons of whipped cream to the filling, whisk.
Stir in hazelnuts and biscuits. Divide the filling into two parts, put melted dark chocolate in one part and melted white chocolate in the other part.

Fill the cake.
Biscuit, darker filling, whipped cream, biscuit, lighter filling, whipped cream, crust. Mix the rest of the fillings on top, I always leave a spoonful or two of filling and a little sweet sour cream. This is my filling with which I coat the third biscuit.
You can decorate with whipped cream or melted chocolate.
The cake must stand for one day in the refrigerator, cut and serve.
Enjoy !

snippet.title: Yemin 316. B√∂l√ľm | The Promise Season 3 Episode 316
snippet.description:
Yemin 316. B√∂l√ľm √Ėzeti:

Yińüit i√ßin konakta kalmayńĪ kabul etse de Feride hen√ľz Emir‚Äôi affedebilmiŇü deńüildir. YaŇüadńĪklarńĪnńĪ bir t√ľrl√ľ unutamayan Feride Emir‚Äôe karŇüńĪ √ßok ańüńĪr konuŇüur. Feride ile Emir bu √ßńĪkmazńĪn i√ßinde daha ne kadar kalacaklar. √Ėte yandan Cavidan, Talaz‚ÄôńĪn takibi sńĪrasńĪnda kaza ge√ßirir. Cavidan √∂l√ľm ile burun buruna gelmiŇütir. D√ľńü√ľn arifesinde hi√ßbir aksilik √ßńĪkmamńĪŇütńĪr ve iki aŇüńĪk sonunda muratlarńĪna ererler. Bundan sonra onlarńĪ Narin ile Kemal‚Äôi mutlu g√ľnler beklemektedir.

Abone olun / Subscribe / Suscr√≠bete: https://bit.ly/2VWzKrR

When Mr Hikmet is given a terminal diagnosis he wonders what will become of the fortune he has worked so hard to amass - he can't leave everything to his frivolous son Emir. He travels to see Reyhan, the daughter of an old family friend. She is a kind and caring girl and Hikmet has her promise to marry Emir, securing a stable future for the family. But Emir makes his own promise - to punish his father for controlling his life he will treat Reyhan so badly that she is forced to leave him.

#Yemin
#ThePromise

snippet.title: VELIKA ILUZIJA 5S 147 EM // Specijal: Dara iz Jasenovca
snippet.description:
U specijalu posveńáenom filmu "Dara iz Jasenovca", ńćija je ekskluzivna svetska televizijska premijera na RTS-u, u "Krupnom planu" je reditelj Predrag Gaga Antonijevińá.

Zbog ńćega se film pre zvanińćne bioskopske premijere u Srbiji zakazane za 22. april kada se obeleŇĺava 76 godina od proboja poslednjih zarobljenika iz logora Jasenovac, prikazuje na televiziji? U kojoj meri su negativni prikazi bili opreteńáenje za film u kontekstu trke za oskarovsku nominaciju? Zbog ńćega "Dara iz Jasenovca" izaziva reakcije i napade onih koji relativizuju zlońćine? Pored reditelja, u specijalu govore scenaristkinja NataŇ°a Drakulińá, glumci Biljana ńĆekińá, Marko Janketińá, Igor ńźorńĎevińá, Nikolina Freganovińá, Anja Stanińá Ilińá, scenograf Goran Joksimovińá, kompozitori Aleksandra Kovańć i Roman GorŇ°ek.

Autor emisije: Sandra Perovińá
Realizacija: Marija AranńĎelovińá, Svetlana Perovińá, Marko Jeftińá.

Label and copyright: Radio-televizija Srbije

snippet.title: Barcelona vs. Paris Saint-Germain: Extended Highlights | UCL on CBS Sports
snippet.description:
Extended Highlights presented by Heineken 

Mbappe and PSG power past Messi and Barcelona 4-1 in the first leg of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16. Mbappe had one of his best performances of his career notching a hat trick. He opened his day with a goal in the 32‚Äô to tie at one and added two more in the 65‚Äô and 85‚Äô. Moise Kean found the back of the net in the 70‚Äô to help solidify the win.  Messi opened the scoring in the 27‚Äô by way of the penalty spot but that would be all the Spanish side could muster. 

Next up will be the second leg back in Paris, France and Barcelona has an uphill battle in front of them. 

Stream every UEFA Champions League match live on CBS All Access:
http://bit.ly/ucloncbssports
